misc: Adopted a L.A.B. Golf zero torque putter for the 2025 season
biography: Simo, representing Hirsala Golf, is a deeply entrenched competitor within the Hector Trophée, poised to make his eleventh appearance in the upcoming 2026 edition. His consistent participation speaks to an enduring dedication to this unique tournament format, establishing him as a familiar and formidable presence on the links.

Over his decade of involvement, Simo has demonstrated a profound aptitude for the unique demands of the pairs format, a skill that has culminated in three triumphant claims of the coveted Hector Trophée. These victories, achieved across various editions, illustrate his masterful command of team strategy and his invaluable contribution to a successful partnership.

Yet, despite his repeated triumphs in the team competition, the singular pursuit of the Victor Trophy, awarded to the tournament's best individual performer, continues to be a notable objective for Simo. His tenacious pursuit of this individual accolade adds another layer of intrigue to his tournament narrative.

Simo possesses a lively competitive spirit, occasionally manifesting in an unreserved expression of passion on the course. This vibrant personality is coupled with a keen analytical approach to his equipment; notably, he embraced the L.A.B. Golf zero torque putter for the 2025 season, an adjustment indicative of his continuous refinement of his game in pursuit of peak performance.

As Simo readies himself for his eleventh outing, all eyes will be on whether his proven team prowess can eventually translate into an individual championship, further solidifying his distinguished position in the history of the Hector Trophée.
